subject: Fermi GBM trigger 681547990 / 220807287 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (FIT) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 681547990 / 220807287
at 06:53:05.16 UT on 7 August 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to particle activity.

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit the official Fermi GBM Support Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
